title: Facilitator Guide — Day 13 — The Business Engine
prepChecklist: Upload and test Program Coach Deck 01 PDF in Playbook faculty view
Open blank Business Engine Canvas preview for projection
Confirm interns can access Playbook Week 3 Day 3 mission and FEC Box 4/5 editors
Brief mentors: morning role play, then FEC + Business Engine Canvas — no compensation discussion
Prepare squad timer for 3–5 minute Business Engine shares

sessionFlow.activity: Morning FNA role play — Agent & Client pairs
sessionFlow.notes: 8 min discovery · 4 min feedback · swap. No product pitch.

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Slides 1–2 — Role play reflection & FEC connection
sessionFlow.notes: What surprised you? What was difficult? What felt natural?

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Slides 3–4 — FEC Box 4 & Box 5 workshop
sessionFlow.notes: Client Experience Blueprint, then Winning Strategy. Playbook Edit FEC buttons.

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Slides 5–7 — Introduce the Business Engine
sessionFlow.notes: 10–5–3–1–₱10,000–3 model. One cycle at a time.

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Slides 8–11 — SPIKE Business Engine Canvas™ workshop
sessionFlow.notes: Page 1 weekly/monthly tables. Page 2 levers, growth simulation, Year 1 commitment.

sessionFlow.activity: Deck 01 Slide 12 — Squad Business Engine shares
sessionFlow.notes: 3–5 min per squad. Close: idea vs venture.

debriefQuestions: What surprised you in the morning role play?
Why will clients choose your practice over another advisor?
Can this engine produce the business you want?
Do you still have an idea — or do you now have a venture?
commonPitfalls: Skipping role play reflection before FEC edits — interns need to connect experience to canvas
Letting Box 4 and Box 5 stay generic without role-play specifics
Treating the Business Engine as theory — insist on real weekly numbers
Jumping to compensation before the operating system is clear
coachingTips: Use Discover · Validate · Advise · Build language consistently
Project the blank Business Engine Canvas during Slides 8–11
Ask squads: what happens if you run this engine for 4 weeks? 12 weeks?
Push for ONE lever on Page 2 — not three improvements at once
